title: montia fontana subsp. limosa
intro: Montia fontana subsp. limosa, also known as spring beauty, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Montiaceae and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Montia fontana subsp. limosa is often used to make teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to reap its benefits.
